page.title: Meet our keynote faculty
page.intro: Innovate 2027 opens with confirmed keynote faculty from Yazdani Aesthetics — Dr. Arjang Yazdani and Nadine Sabino, RN. Additional speakers will be announced as the program is finalized.
page.moreComingNote: Additional keynote speakers will be announced as the program is confirmed.

speakers.name: Dr. Arjang Yazdani
speakers.bio: Royal College-certified plastic surgeon specializing in reconstructive and cosmetic surgery. Dr. Yazdani is Chief of Plastic Surgery at London Health Sciences Centre and Chairman of Plastic Surgery at Western University, with a practice spanning surgical and non-surgical aesthetic care.

speakers.name: Nadine Sabino, RN
speakers.bio: Partner at Yazdani Aesthetics and one of Canada's most experienced aesthetic nurses, with deep expertise in lasers, injectables, and non-surgical treatments. Nadine is an in-demand national speaker and trainer, with a background in surgical nursing and provider education.
